defs: Yuan river in Guizhou and Hunan
Yuan River, one of the largest rivers in Hunan
lit. legendary nine-ribbed turtle of Yuan river
Yuanjiang, a county-level city in Yiyang City 益陽市|益阳市[Yi4 yang2 Shi4], Hunan
see 沅陵縣|沅陵县[Yuan2 ling2 Xian4]
Yuanling, a county in Huaihua City 懷化市|怀化市[Huai2 hua4 Shi4], Hunan
